title: SAP Fieldglass Audit Trail API - auditTrail
description: auditTrail schema for SAP Fieldglass Audit Trail API

type.description: >- Reflects the type of subscription/delivery method or the type of integration connector being processed.

company.description: Client buyer code associated to the subscription/integration.

startTime.description: >- Time and date associated to the start time of the subscription process or individual file transfer. Only applicable to integration file errors.

stopTime.description: Time and date associated to the stop time of the subscription process or individual file transfer

user.description: Integration User associated to client integration process (systematic/manual).

category.description: Description of source audit trail where the error/exception occurred from (the subscription/delivery audit trail or the integration audit trail of the delivered and processed file).

ID.description: Unique ID associated to the specific integration file being processed within SAP Fieldglass.

version.description: Reflects the current version and type of the integration connector.

company.description: Name of object as defined by user.

documentStatus.description: Status of the delivery of the integration between SAP Fieldglass and external platform.

deliveryTime.description: Time associated to the subscription delivery of the integration (not the individually processed integration file).

deliveryStatus.description: Reflected status of the subscription / delivery for the integration.

message.description: Detailed message associated to the delivery or document associated to the subscription and delivery of the integration.

duration.description: Amount of time associated to the processing of an integration file within SAP F Fieldglass.

serverStatus.description: Reflects the standard error message associated to the integration file processing.

serverMessage.description: Associated to errors on the subscription and individual integration files processing.

recordsProcessed.description: >- Number of records processed within a file transfer. Not displayed for a subscription error.

recordsFailed.description: Number of records failed within a file transfer. Not displayed for a subscription error.

uploadFile.description: Name of the file associated to the integration.

details.description: All ok if response is OK.
